name: Frosted Peach Squares
recipeIngredient: 29 ounces peach slices in juice, undrained
recipeInstructions:
Frosting
2 cups powdered sugar
1/2 teaspoon vanilla
2 tablespoons milk
Mix 1/2 cup sugar, cornstarch and salt in saucepan. Stir in yolk and undrained peaches, cook until mixture comes to a boil. Cool.
Mix together 1 1/4 cups flour, salt and yeast. Combine butter, milk and water until warm. Add to flour mixture and beat 2 minutes on medium speed. Add yolks and 1/2 cup flour. Beat 2 more minutes at high speed. Stir in enough flour to make a soft dough. Divide dough into two halves and roll out to fit a 15x10 inch jelly roll pan. Top with cooled peach filling. Roll remaining dough for top, seal edges together. Snip the top of dough for steam vents, cover and let rise 1 hour. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes. Cool on wire rack. Frost while warm with frosting.
